response:
Alex reads books.
Books hold stories.
Stories show love.
Love brings change.
Change shifts views.
Views were old.
Old ideas fade.
Fade makes space.
Space holds new.
New thoughts grow.
Grow means effort.
Effort takes time.
Time passes fast.
Fast days fly.
Fly through pages.
Pages count high.
High numbers add.
Add up sums.
Sums reveal rates.
Rates show speed.
Speed stays same.
Same pace works.
Works well today.
Today counts much.
Much data helps.
Helps find truth.
Truth lies plain.
Plain facts speak.
Speak loud clear.
Clear math wins.
Wins bring joy.
Joy fills heart.
Heart beats strong.
Strong mind learns.
